connections.def: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with 3588) the supreme Divinity; figuratively, a magistrate; by Hebraism, very:--X exceeding, God, god(-ly, -ward). see GREEK for

connections.gloss: godly (man), good, holy (one), merciful, saint, (un-) godly.

connections.def: adverb from 2152; piously:--godly. see GREEK for
